evals.name: onboarding-commitment-ladder
evals.prompt: Design an onboarding sequence that gets users to make small authentic commitments before asking for a subscription.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.

evals.name: pricing-lowball-audit
evals.prompt: Audit this pricing flow for lowball tactics and commitment traps; suggest a cleaner version.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.
